title: Hillary Clinton Deposed by House Panel About Epstein
description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton was deposed behind closed doors by the House Oversight Committee about her ties to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein. Her husband, former President Bill Clinton is set to to face questioning Friday. Megan Scully reports.
content: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton was deposed behind closed doors by the House Oversight Committee about her ties to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein. Her husband, former President Bill Clinton is set to to face questioning Friday. Megan Scully reports.
